src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Modernize Javadoc comment formatting and style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a web.xml.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a servlet container like Tomcat, JBoss etc.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a Servlet container like Tomcat, JBoss etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor application startup logging into a separate method with improved context path handling and safer host address resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: log.info("...", env.getProperty("spring.application.name"), protocol, env.getProperty("server.port"), protocol, InetAddress.getLocalHost().getHostAddress(), env.getProperty("server.port"), env.getActiveProfiles());

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update documentation URLs from http to https.
Refactor logging to use a dynamic logger based on the JoinPoint's declaring type instead of a static class-level logger.
Simplify log messages by removing the declaring type name, relying on the dynamic logger to provide context.
Reformat annotation arguments to span multiple lines for better readability.
Update Javadoc comments to use standard formatting and explicit type references.

@param e exception
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@param joinPoint join point for advice.
@param e exception.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor class body to single-line style for empty classes.
Remove unused import for JHipsterProperties.
Add import for TaskExecutionProperties.
Reorganize imports to follow standard ordering (java, org, tech).
Remove deprecated Spring Boot auto-configuration annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: AutoConfigureAfter and AutoConfigureBefore are deprecated in newer Spring Boot versions and may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor cache creation to use a helper method and repository constants.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This is a structural improvement to reduce code duplication and improve maintainability, not a compilation requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new domain entity caches for BankAccount, Label, and Operation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These are new features added to the application, not required for JDK migration compatibility.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add Git and Build properties injection for cache key generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This supports enhanced cache key generation with build metadata, not a JDK migration requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This provides better cache key management with build/git prefixes, not a JDK migration requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the login regex pattern to enforce stricter validation rules, likely requiring an email format or a specific set of allowed characters.
Rename the constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM to align with updated naming conventions or framework standards.
Remove the unused ANONYMOUS_USER constant as it is no longer needed in the application logic.
Refactor the private constructor to use empty braces instead of an empty block for code style consistency.
Remove unused imports related to the removed Liquibase configuration and reflection logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile warning/error: unused imports for removed classes.

Add JavaTimeModule to support Java 8+ date and time API serialization.
Add Jdk8Module to support Java 8 specific types like Optional.
Add explicit public visibility modifier to bean methods for consistency.
Update Javadoc comments to accurately describe the purpose of the JavaTimeModule bean.
Remove unused EnvironmentAware interface implementation.
